temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a computer monitor displaying a complex user interface. The screen is filled with a dark blue, grid-like background. On the left, a map with various lines and numbers is visible. In the center, a prominent black box contains large white Chinese characters that read, "有內鬼, 終止交易" which translates to "There is a mole, terminate the transaction." To the right, a menu with options like "Scan," "Lockout," and "Pause" is displayed. Below this, another section shows a list of phone numbers starting with "+852." At the very bottom of the frame, the text "SEND MESSAGE ALL GSM900" and "2way communication" is visible. The camera remains static, holding the shot on the monitor. The audio is composed entirely of electronic sound effects, creating a high-tech and slightly tense atmosphere. It begins with a series of sharp, digital beeps and a low, pulsing electronic hum that evokes the feeling of a computer system processing data or running a program. The view on the computer monitor changes, now showing a different part of the interface. The central black box is gone, and the screen is filled with a dense, scrolling list of phone numbers, all beginning with "+852." Above this list, a faint, abstract blue line graph is visible. In the top left corner, the white Chinese text "风行网" appears. The camera is still, capturing the data flow on the screen. The shot on the computer monitor shifts again. A new black box appears in the center of the screen with the text "DETECT GSM900" and "52 SELECT CELL" in white. The scrolling list of phone numbers continues to scroll in the background. The abstract blue line graph and the "风行网" text remain in their respective positions. The camera holds this static shot, emphasizing the text and the data processing. The sounds are crisp and clear, suggesting a digital environment like a computer interface or a communication system. There is no narration or dialogue in the audio.
